notes: HorizonBench: Long-Horizon Personalization with Evolving Preferences (Li et al., arXiv:2604.17283, April 2026). 360 user timelines with structured mental state graphs tracking preference evolution over 6-month horizon. 1.6M conversation turns generated by 3 frontier LLMs (Claude-Sonnet-4.5, o3, Gemini-3-flash). Demographics: ethnicity, occupation, location. ~30 preference evolution domains include response structure, emotional tone, support style, communication intimacy, positivity level, strategic depth, collaboration style, dietary preferences, social/work/commute habits, financial priorities. Key columns: user_id, generator, user_profile, timeline_metadata, preference_record, event_record, conversations.
